reviews.text:
Wildbliss is one of the best photography companies in Colorado. We booked them for our wedding after looking through their social media platforms and photos shared from the venue and they knocked it out of the park. Our package we also included an engagement photo session.

Candice and Jessica we're incredibly helpful in getting the correct poses for us, and running with a provided list of images we wanted for our big day, while keeping things very light and fun. They really do have an eye for capturing images that I wouldn't have thought of to begin with as well.

We'll absolutely work with them again in the future.

As a fellow vendor I have worked with wild bliss photography many times. Her coupes are always happy and love their photos and her images are so beautiful. She captures emotions so well. She delivers her albums quick. I highly recommend!

We LOVE our family photos from Wild Bliss Photography!! I happened to see a promotional email from Wild Bliss and booked a mini session for October 2024. That session got rained out so we rescheduled for November. Unfortunately, I had 2 family members pass away so we had to reschedule again. Jessica and Candice were so sweet and the third time was the charm! We're a large brood and they captured each of us perfectly! They were fun to work with and definitely captured the best of all of us. Photos are such an incredible treasure and these photos are priceless! We highly recommend Jessica and Candice at Wild Bliss Photography!! You will not be disappointed!

We’ve worked with Wild Bliss Photography for several years for our firm’s team photos, and they consistently deliver exceptional results. Their professionalism, attention to detail, and ability to make everyone feel comfortable in front of the camera set them apart. The final images are always polished and aligned with our brand. Highly recommend for any business looking for reliable, high-quality photography.

Jessica and Candice with Wild Bliss have done my engagement photos, my wedding photos, and even branding photos/headshots for my job- and they have killed every single shoot! They truly are amazing!

For our wedding, they truly went above and beyond taking all the important individual and family shots in the short span of time before we lost light. We just received our sneak peak are in love with how they turned out and are SO grateful to have chosen Jessica and Candice to capture those special moments.

If you are looking around for a photographer for family shots, branding, a mini shoot, a wedding, anything really- go with Wild Bliss. I promise you will not be disappointed.

Thank you so both SO much!
